intents.text: Create a test extension with a slash command that injects a hidden message instructing the model to output a specific signal string.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: a slash command, something like /start which injects a hidden custom message

intents.text: Extension should listen for message_end and react to the signal string by showing/closing UI or other actions.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: listen for message_end and react accordingly, e.g. by showing ui, or closing ui

intents.text: Move the extension to cwd/.pi/extensions so it can be reloaded.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: move that to cwd/.pi/extensions so i can relaod

intents.text: Reports that UI says 'signal ui is open waiting for signal close ui' unexpectedly.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: now it says signal ui is open waiting for signal close ui

intents.text: Outputting open and close in the same message causes both to execute; need to separate them across turns.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: if you output open and close, close is also executed

intents.text: Do 10 turns reading all README.md files 10 lines each, open UI on first turn, close on last turn.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: 10 turns, read all the @README.md files 10 lines each. open on first turn, close on last turn

intents.text: UI freezes during model output; markdown streams in but typing is blocked.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: when you output shit, the ui kinda freezes. i see markdown coming in, but i basically can't type

intents.text: Is the UI code in message_end/update path broken? Are we recreating UI on every update?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: is the ui code int he message_end/update path foobar? do we recreate ui all the time?
